title: Podman failing to start on MacOS
body:
### Issue Description

I installed Podman with `brew install podman` and then tried to run init with 
`podman machine init`
Followed this up with 
`podman machine start` but that left me with 
```
$ podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Error: machine did not transition into running state
```
It has been doing this for quite some time but used to work fine about 1 month ago when I last tried. I have tried reinstalling it after clearing all the files and yet it leads to the same result.
Is there some other non brew mechanism to install (say from a tar.gz)?

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. brew install podman
2. podman machine init
3. podman machine start


### Describe the results you received

Waiting for VM ...
Error: machine did not transition into running state

### Describe the results you expected

I expect it to start and show file system mounts.

### podman info output

```yaml
podman version 4.7.1
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

This happens on my Macbook Pro (M1 Pro) but works fine on my Macbook Air (M1).

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Probably solved with 5.0, please re-open if this is not the case
